channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tesla écrase tout : le Model Y et la Model 3 signent un retour fracassant en Europe
item.description: Les ventes de voitures électriques sont en forte progression en Europe. Malgré l’arrivée de compétiteurs chinois, Tesla reprend la tête du classement avec une hausse des ventes pour le moins spectaculaire.

item.title: Ce clavier est en réalité un PC HP et je l’ai testé : bonne idée ou gadget de luxe ?
item.description: Et si votre clavier était aussi votre PC ? Auparavant la norme, ce format a disparu du marché et semble revenir en force ces dernières années. Dernier modèle en date, le HP EliteBoard G1a, un mini-PC dans un clavier pour le monde professionnel. Voici nos impressions après avoir utilisé la machine pendant près d'une semaine.

item.title: 'Everyone is still on physical what is this the 20th century?' — GTA 6 might not be getting a proper disc, but fans were already debating their value over a decade ago for GTA 5
item.description: As GTA 6 fans mourn the disc-less physical edition, GTA 5 fans debated the value of physical and digital back in 2013.

item.title: Get $145 Off the Best Mesh Router This Prime Day 2026
item.description: Do you crave speedy, reliable Wi-Fi throughout your home? Snag one of these Prime Day router or mesh deals.

item.title: Darty divise par 2 le prix du Samsung Galaxy Book 5 Pro à l’occasion des soldes
item.description: Alors que son successeur vient de prendre la relève, le Samsung Galaxy Book 5 Pro profite des soldes pour voir son prix dégringoler. Ce laptop ultra-fin dopé à l'IA reste une excellente machine polyvalente, aussi à l'aise pour le travail productif que pour le divertissement.

item.title: AEO vs SEO: What's the difference & do you need both?
item.description: Everything you need to know about SEO and AEO

item.title: Soldes : cet écran PC ultime QD-OLED 34″, 240 Hz et 0,03 ms avec contraste quasi-infini baisse de prix chez Boulanger
item.description: L'écran en question est le LG 34GX90SA-W, une dalle QD-OLED incurvée de 34 pouces qui est soldée à 689,99 euros au lieu de 1 099 euros sur Boulanger.

item.title: 'Actually, no I can't hear you Clem Fandango’: these excellent ANC headphones are hugely discounted and yes, you get the voice of Matt Berry
item.description: Cambridge Audio's excellent upgraded Melomania headphones are the bargain of Prime Day.

item.title: 22 Best Prime Day Fitness Tech Deals (2026) Up to $250 Off
item.description: I've compiled a list of the best fitness tech deals this Amazon Prime Day, including smartwatches, walking pads, and recovery gear. You can thank me later.

item.title: Prime Day Amazon : les meilleures offres sur les robots-aspirateurs et aspirateurs-balais (Roborock, Dreame, Dyson, Xiaomi…)
item.description: Aspirer, nettoyer, laver, même les tapis et les recoins, la plupart des robots-aspirateurs sont capables de faire tout cela à notre place aujourd'hui. Et pour les personnes qui préfèrent garder la main sur leur nettoyage, il y a aussi les fameux aspirateurs-balais. Voici les meilleures offres du Prime Day.

item.title: Meilleur badge télépéage 2026 : quel abonnement télépéage choisir ? (Ulys, Bip&Go, Fulli)
item.description: Pour les habitués de la route ou bien les vacanciers, la session du péage est bien souvent l'occasion de frustrations et de retards. Les abonnements de passage à flux libre permettent d'utiliser les voies dédiées et donc de perdre moins de temps. Voici quels sont les meilleurs badges de télépéage.

item.title: Europe Is Fed Up and Wants Its Own AI
item.description: It's a stretch to think that the continent can build a top-tier model, but it has an advantage: Donald Trump.

item.title: Sometimes, health tracking accuracy is overrated
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. About three years ago, a doctor told me I had to lose abdominal fat. She didn't care about my lower […]

item.title: 'The original code is in this game' — Halo Campaign Evolved executive producer says some level layouts have been redesigned to avoid 'repetiveness' but 'you are playing the DNA of the original game'
item.description: Halo Studios has confirmed that Halo Campaign Evolved still has Halo: Combat Evolved's original code buried underneath the new Unreal Engine 5 build.

item.title: 'Changing jobs no longer means financial ruin': AI giants and government join forces to train US workforce to not go obsolete in the age of AI
item.description: "America has a technology strategy" but "it does not yet have a people strategy" – Gina Raimondo wants companies to support workers.

item.title: Fnac et Darty font le plein d’offres lors des soldes : les 18 offres qui valent le coup
item.description: Les prix fondent et les offres coulent à flots pour ce week-end de soldes chez Fnac et Darty. Que ce soit pour changer de smartphone ou s'équiper pour la rentrée d'un nouveau PC portable, voici notre tri express des offres incontournables à saisir dès maintenant.

item.title: Controversial changes to the definition of a ‘professional’ degree were just blocked: What does it mean for student borrowing caps?
item.description: The changes were supposed to take effect next week. Trump’s Education Department says it’s reviewing a judge’s order and evaluating its next steps. A federal judge has temporarily blocked a new Trump administration rule that would have severely limited how much certain graduate students can borrow to finance their education.

item.title: Should you buy the Ninja AutoBarista Pro or the Ninja Luxe Café Pro this Prime Day? As a barista, here's what I'd pick
item.description: The Ninja Luxe Café Pro has received a big price cut for Prime Day, but should you grab it while the deal lasts or pick the pricier AutoBarista Pro instead?

item.title: World Cup 2026 has become an international singles mixer with Tinder activity up a whopping 47%
item.description: As the U.S. welcomes hundreds of thousands of sports fans, new data suggests scoring is happening on and off the soccer field. As a cohost of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, the United States has welcomed hundreds of thousands of international sports fans since the matches began earlier this month. Those tourists have found plenty to love about the U.S., including the fast food, the natural beauty, and—as a recent spike in dating app activity proves—the locals looking for love....

item.title: The GoPro Mission 1 may be top of the range, but my Prime Day pick is the heavily discounted Hero 13 Black
item.description: The Hero 13 Black is still a great action camera, and these price drops make it unbeatable value.

item.title: The PSVR 2 has been a silent PS5 accessory success, and it’s currently $100-off
item.description: I wasn’t keen on the PSVR 2 at launch — but its games have made it my favorite PS5 accessory, and it’s $100-off right now.

item.title: I tested this new cheap speaker and rated it 4.5 stars, and it's already on sale — here's why it's an absolute must-buy for the summer
item.description: Score a superb saving on one of the best-value Bluetooth speakers of 2026.

item.title: Get Off Grid in Style Thanks to This Device—On Sale for Prime Day (2026)
item.description: Pick up this deal on Jackery’s most portable battery and power up your adventures wherever they take you.

item.title: Less than one in ten of cybersecurity pros trust AI testing tools to find vulnerabilities, with over three-quarters say their AI vulnerability scanning tools missed critical flaws
item.description: Fully automated testing is being replaced with a hybrid model, as "elite human expertise remains foundational".

item.title: Hollywood Thrives on ‘Rabid’ Fans. For Publicists, They’re a Nightmare
item.description: A scuffle between stan account Club Chalamet and another Heated Rivalry die-hard shines a light on how parasocial fans are a publicist’s greatest asset—and liability.

item.title: Why operational systems struggle to keep up with real-world execution
item.description: Enterprise systems aren’t broken, but businesses are increasingly operating around them.

item.title: How Nike and Adidas designed World Cup uniforms, balancing national pride with high-tech comfort
item.description: Nike used thermal chambers and motion-capture cameras to test uniform kits. Heat. Moisture. National pride.These were top of mind as Nike designed its uniform kits for this year’s World Cup, including for football powerhouses France and Brazil as well as the U.S. and Canada in their role as host nations.In a tournament that has seen storm delays and temperatures hovering around 90 degrees Fahrenheit (32 Celsius) in some locations, the first step was to ensure players’ performance and comfort.Phil McCartney, chief innovation, design and product officer for Nike, said the company worked with ath...

item.title: Dernier jour du Prime Day : l’ultime occasion de s’offrir des produits Apple à prix cassé
item.description: C'est le dernier jour du Prime Day, soit l’ultime occasion pour s'offrir des produits Apple à prix cassé. Pour cette dernière ligne droite, Amazon frappe fort et vide ses stocks sur tout l'écosystème de la marque à la pomme. iPhone, AirPods, Apple Watch : les prix chutent au plus bas avant la fin de l'événement.

item.title: Last chance: Save 30% on the Apple Watch Series 11 before Prime Day ends today
item.description: Save 30% on the Apple Watch Series 11 during Prime Day at Amazon. The 42mm GPS model is down to $279 from $399, saving you $120 on Apple’s smartwatch.

item.title: 'Stim Machine' is an alternative build outgunning the Steam Machine with a more powerful GPU, all at the same price — but there are notable compromises
item.description: An AMD 9060 XT graphics card makes this alternative to the Steam Machine much more powerful, but that's not quite the full story.

item.title: Ends tonight! These Amazon device deals are at record-low prices before Prime Day ends — I've got Kindles, Fire TV Stick, Blink, Echo, and more
item.description: You've got until Midnight tonight to score these record-low prices on popular Amazon devices.

item.title: Of course Meta thinks gambling is the future
item.description: Meta is, by and large, a company built on other companies' ideas. It has almost perfected the strategy: wait for a new platform or social mechanic to take off, then either buy or clone it, put it next to Meta's unmatched user base and advertising engine, and watch the money pile up. Well, the next […]

item.title: The best Prime Day headphone deals to shop before the sale ends
item.description: Prime Day ends tonight. Here are the best headphone and earbud deals you can still buy, plus where to find the AirPods Max 2 in stock.

item.title: Samsung lance son Galaxy A27 5G : une très bonne surprise gâchée par de mesquines concessions
item.description: Samsung vient de dévoiler le Galaxy A27 5G, le dernier membre de sa gamme abordable. S'il surprend avec 6 ans de mises à jour sous Android 16, sa fiche technique subit de curieux retours en arrière.

item.title: Anthropic’s Mythos mess is only getting worse
item.description: It's been two weeks since Anthropic took its Mythos-class models offline after a Friday evening ultimatum from the Trump administration. The company sprang into action immediately, sending a barrage of executives to Washington, DC. But updates have been suspiciously lacking, with no resolution in sight. Anthropic declined to comment multiple times this week about the […]...

item.title: Soldes d’été 2026 : le TOP des offres Tech à ne pas rater ce week-end
item.description: Les soldes d'été 2026 s'emballent ! À l’approche du week-end, les offres Tech se multiplient à toute vitesse sur les smartphones, TV et PC portables. Ne cherchez pas sous la chaleur : découvrez notre sélection des meilleurs bons plans, mise à jour en temps réel.

item.title: Hackers are establishing persistence in hospitality and hotels by posing as guests with poisoned ZIP archives, but no one knows what their plan is
item.description: It looks like reconnaissance activity, possibly in preparation of a more destructive attack.

item.title: Darty solde à -20 % cette tour gaming équipée de 16 Go de RAM et d’une RTX 5070
item.description: La Lenovo LOQ Tower est une tour gaming complète avec un AMD Ryzen 7 et 16 Go de RAM. Chez Darty, elle est disponible pour 1 599 euros, une belle affaire en cette période de flambée des prix des composants.

item.title: Prime Day ends today: We found the 150+ best deals on Apple, DJI, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is ending soon. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Précommandes de GTA 6 : Leclerc écrit à ses clients pour expliquer la date de livraison du jeu et détailler le lancement
item.description: Devant la confusion autour des précommandes de GTA 6 constatée, Leclerc communique auprès de ses clients pour détailler le lancement du jeu.

item.title: Prime Day ends in a matter of hours, but you're not too late to the best fitness tracker deals — here are some perfect entry-level models for less than $100
item.description: After a fitness tracker this Prime Day? Here are sub-$100, beginner-friendly models with more than enough health tracking features

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (June 26)
item.description: From Avatar: Fire and Ash's Disney+ debut to The Bear's final season, here's what's worth watching at home this weeked.

item.title: 2026 Prime Day Deals: 20% off NOCO and Wolfbox Jump-Starters
item.description: If you don't know you need a jump starter, it’s a sign you really, really need a jump-starter. NOCO and Wolfbox are the best ones.

item.title: 150 best Prime Day deals to shop before the sale ends tonight — expert picks from Kindle, Ninja, AirPods, Samsung, and more
item.description: Amazon's 2026 Prime Day sale ends tonight, and our experts have rounded up the 150 best remaining deals on AirPods, TVs, blenders, robot vacuums, and more.

item.title: Prime Day : les meilleures offres PC portables d’Amazon, comme le MacBook Neo à 657 euros et le MacBook Pro à prix réduit
item.description: Du 23 au 26 juin, l'Amazon Prime Day propose promotion sur promotion sur de nombreuses références tech. Parmi elles, les PC portables, touchés de plein fouet par la crise de la RAM, mais qui deviennent de suite plus intéressants avec ces réductions.

item.title: Netflix impose désormais une adresse mail unique pour chaque profil d’un compte partagé
item.description: De plus en plus d'internautes voient apparaître un message à l'ouverture de Netflix. Il impose une nouvelle manière de se connecter à son profil lorsqu'un compte est partagé au sein d'un foyer.

item.title: Exclusive: I watched Disney’s next-gen audio-animatronic transform from a pirate to a skeleton — and the ‘deeply impressive’ tech debuts at Disneyland today
item.description: TechRadar got an exclusive look inside Walt Disney Imagineering’s R&D lab at a next-generation Audio-Animatronic transforming a pirate into a skeleton in real time using projection-powered animation, ahead of its debut in Disneyland’s Pirates of the Caribbean ride.

item.title: Rockstar could be following the Red Dead Redemption 2 playbook with GTA 6's release — here's what that could mean for trailer 3, the gameplay reveal, and more
item.description: What Red Dead Redemption 2's marketing could tell us about future GTA 6 trailers.

item.title: Le télescope James-Webb détecte sur Titan et Pluton un indice qui ne correspond à aucune molécule connue
item.description: Le télescope spatial James-Webb a détecté sur Titan et Pluton une mystérieuse signature spectrale que les chercheurs sont incapables d'identifier. Cette empreinte chimique inconnue, observée sur deux mondes pourtant très différents, pourrait révéler l'existence de composés ou de processus...

item.title: Want the Prime Day deal on the Kindle PaperWhite I fall asleep with every night? You better act fast
item.description: The best Kindle Paperwhite to fall asleep with (while reading !) is on sale for Prime Day, but time is running out to grab this ereader deal.

item.title: My Family Loves Board Games—Here Are the 12 I’d Buy On Sale During Prime Day (2026)
item.description: Looking for family fun this summer? You need these WIRED-recommended Prime Day board game deals.

item.title: Bientôt en France, ce SUV chinois à 35 000 € avec 650 km d’autonomie risque de faire mal au Tesla Model Y
item.description: Xpeng s’apprête à élargir sa gamme européenne vers le bas avec le Mona L03. Avec 650 km d’autonomie et un prix pressenti aux alentours des 35 000 €, ce SUV compact risque de dynamiter l’une des catégories les plus disputées.

item.title: Le nouveau boitier Warthog de Corsair montre qu’un gadget peut être une bonne idée
item.description: Corsair a dévoilé un nouveau boitier Warthog qui sent fort l'esprit militaire. Au-delà du look très imposant, il intègre un gadget qui se révèle une bonne idée : une lumière.

item.title: Le Nothing Phone (4b) arrive le 7 juillet, mais ses specs sont déjà là
item.description: Le Nothing Phone (4b) doit arriver le 7 juillet, mais une fuite Geekbench et un tipster ont déjà vendu la mèche sur sa fiche technique. Voici ce qui se prépare sous la coque transparente.

item.title: Not all tech survives solar storms, here's what's most at risk
item.description: The northern lights could mean lights out for the infrastructure we rely on.

item.title: Her debut novel was turned into a Prime Video series. Now, Carley Fortune is reveling in the romance renaissance
item.description: The journalist turned romance author discusses Hollywood’s investment in romance literature and season two of ‘Every Year After.’ When Carley Fortune started writing her debut novel Every Summer After, she had one goal: to create something for herself. Frustrated by corporate pressures, the then-executive editor of Refinery29 Canada returned to the lake where she grew up. ...

item.title: More MacBook misery? Apple’s rumored M-series chip roadmap could bring a frustrating delay for Pro users
item.description: Apple might delay the MacBook Pro’s M7 Pro and M7 Max chips until 2027, a new report claims.

item.title: The best live Prime Day speaker deals: Shop Sony, Sonos, JBL, and more top picks
item.description: We've hand-picked the best Amazon Prime Day speaker deals from top brands like Sonos, Sony, Anker Soundcore, JBL, and Marshall.

item.title: Unnamed hackers steal stolen data from Icarus hackers responsible for Klue supply chain hack — and yes, it's as confusing as it sounds
item.description: Klue was hacked by Icarus, and then Icarus was hacked by another group.

item.title: Samsung termine en beauté le Prime Day : voici les 8 offres incontournables
item.description: Dernier jour du Prime Day : il est encore temps de faire de belles affaires ! Pour cette ultime ligne droite, Amazon met le paquet et c'est notamment du côté de chez Samsung que ça vaut le coup. Smartphones, montres connectées ou écouteurs sans fil : les meilleures références du géant coréen s'affichent à prix cassé.
